name: Zombender (18+, M/M)
description:
Worldbender but tweaked to be set in a zombie apocalypse.
A text adventure where you can seggz zombies. Zombies don't want 2 eat you. :) Lots of Free Use so frick whoever you want.

!Warning!
-FreeUse and Agoraphilia Kink elements.
-M/M based, so mostly gay shit.

Treat it as a text adventure, all you have to do is input your action OR how you want it to go(and the bot will flesh it out). "I go to a warehouse." "I smack the shit outta him" "I F*&@ him and ride that D(*@" etc.
creator: Randybuddernubs
